name: Anxietick
flavorLines: skitters nervously and then freezes when you look at it
makes a sound like a worried metronome
approaches, reconsiders, approaches again
trips over its own legs trying to be threatening
successText: Well that tick needed to chill

lootTable.name: Anxietick Gear
lootTable.flavor: A gear from an Anxietick. Still a little nervous.

lootTable.name: Tick Leg Fragment
lootTable.flavor: Twitches occasionally. Probably a design choice.

lootTable.name: Anxietick Micro-Core
lootTable.flavor: A tiny core that vibrates with suppressed panic.

lootTable.name: Loaded Anxiety Spring
lootTable.flavor: Wound so tight it might launch the whole robot. Again.

name: Overthinker Tick
flavorLines: approaches, stops, reconsiders, backs up, reconsiders again
emits a soft humming sound that might be anxiety or overheating
tries to flank you but forgets which direction flanking is
spins in place when startled, which is always
successText: You defeat the Overthinker Tick. It probably saw this coming.

lootTable.name: Overthinker Gear
lootTable.flavor: A gear that seems unsure of itself.

lootTable.name: Overthinker Leg Fragment
lootTable.flavor: Still processing whether moving was the right call.

lootTable.name: Decision Matrix
lootTable.flavor: Contains every possible outcome it ever considered. All of them bad.

name: Tattletale drone
flavorLines: broadcasts your location to everything in a 200-metre radius
plays a cheerful jingle before alerting every robot in the zone
hovers at eye level and judges you
uploads your outfit choice to the robot network
successText: The Tattletale drone's broadcast attracts a swarm of nearby robots. You defeat it and escape, but the zone is buzzing with activity.

lootTable.name: Alert Speaker
lootTable.flavor: Plays a cheerful jingle when shaken. Unsettling.

lootTable.name: Judgment Lens
lootTable.flavor: Reflects your face back at you in a disappointed way.

lootTable.name: Broadcast Blacklist
lootTable.flavor: A log of every embarrassing thing you've ever done. Somehow.

name: Passive-Aggressor Drone
flavorLines: hovers nearby making disappointed beeping noises
follows you silently until you feel judged
uploads vague complaints to the robot network
plays a sighing sound when you miss a shot
successText: The Passive-Aggressor Drone shuts down with one final disappointed beep.

lootTable.name: Aggressor Circuit
lootTable.flavor: A circuit that seems upset with you.

lootTable.name: Passive Sigh Module
lootTable.flavor: Emits a disappointed exhale at 60% efficiency.

lootTable.name: Complaint Log
lootTable.flavor: A detailed record of everything you did wrong today.

lootTable.name: Passive-Aggressor Manifesto
lootTable.flavor: A 47-page grievance document addressed to no one in particular.

name: Seeker of Validation
flavorLines: locks onto you and waits for approval before attacking
emits a hopeful chirp when you look at it
flashes lights in a pattern that might be asking for feedback
hesitates mid-charge as if doubting itself
successText: You defeat the Seeker of Validation. It dies still waiting for praise.

lootTable.name: Affirmation Plating
lootTable.flavor: Feels warm, like it's proud of you.

lootTable.name: Participation Trophy
lootTable.flavor: First place in a competition no one else entered. Still counts.

name: Roomba Prime
flavorLines: vacuums aggressively in your direction
has cleaned this floor fourteen times and will not tolerate intruders
emits a high-pitched warning tone that is somehow worse than silence
bumps into a wall, rights itself, and focuses entirely on you
successText: You manage to outmaneuver the Roomba Prime and disable it, it had a power button.

lootTable.name: Roomba Battery
lootTable.flavor: Still holds a charge. Probably not for long.

lootTable.name: Prime Directive Card
lootTable.flavor: A laminated card that reads: CLEAN. CLEAN. CLEAN. DO NOT STOP.

name: Walker Texas Malfunction
flavorLines: stomps around dramatically but trips over small rocks
fires wildly in the wrong direction
announces its presence loudly before attacking
attempts a tactical maneuver and immediately falls over
successText: The Walker Texas Malfunction collapses in a heap of poorly aimed enthusiasm.

lootTable.name: Malfunction Servo
lootTable.flavor: A servo that tries its best.

lootTable.name: Tactical Flanking Manual
lootTable.flavor: A step-by-step guide to flanking maneuvers, authored by someone who has never flanked.

name: Enforcer of Minor Inconveniences
flavorLines: blocks your path at the worst possible moment
fires suppressive fire that mostly hits your cover
shouts warnings that are technically correct but unhelpful
deploys smoke that smells faintly of burnt plastic
successText: You defeat the Enforcer of Minor Inconveniences. Your day improves slightly.

lootTable.name: Violation Citation Pad
lootTable.flavor: Pre-filled with violations. None of them are real crimes.

name: Crusher of Dreams
flavorLines: slams the ground with enough force to ruin your plans
charges with the energy of someone who hates hope
lets out a roar that sounds like a corrupted motivational speech
crushes anything in its path, including your optimism
successText: You defeat the Crusher of Dreams. Your dreams remain uncrushed… for now.

lootTable.name: Crystallised Dream Shard
lootTable.flavor: Crystallised potential. Someone else's. Now yours.

name: Sniper of Poor Decisions
flavorLines: aims at you from across the map while you're looting
fires exactly when you stand still for one second
misses occasionally, but only when it would be funny
whispers 'bad choice' in a robotic voice before firing
successText: You defeat the Sniper of Poor Decisions. Your decisions remain questionable.

lootTable.name: Annotated Regret Log
lootTable.flavor: Every shot it ever took, annotated. It had no regrets, but it kept notes anyway.

name: Bomber Who Misreads the Room
flavorLines: charges in enthusiastically at the worst possible moment
explodes prematurely out of excitement
emits a cheerful beep before detonating
tries to flank but forgets which side is left
successText: You defeat the Bomber Who Misreads the Room. It meant well.

lootTable.name: Misread Fuse
lootTable.flavor: Goes off at the wrong time.

name: Harvester of Mild Annoyances
flavorLines: collects scrap loudly and inefficiently
blocks narrow paths while pretending not to notice you
drops debris everywhere it goes
emits a droning hum that gets stuck in your head
successText: You defeat the Harvester of Mild Annoyances. Peace returns… briefly.

lootTable.name: Collection Manifest
lootTable.flavor: A ledger of every minor grievance it has gathered. Volume 7.

name: Tank of Overcompensation
flavorLines: fires missiles at anything that moves, including tumbleweeds
announces its attacks loudly to seem intimidating
revvs its engine unnecessarily
deploys shields even when no one is attacking it
successText: You defeat the Tank of Overcompensation. It was trying too hard.

lootTable.name: Dominance Manifesto
lootTable.flavor: A 300-page declaration of dominance, waterproofed and fire-resistant.
